root_cause: Live Workroom used a legacy pipeline and unnormalized live-only action/render shape while persisted refresh state stripped actions. The bad unknown-context fallback came from src/lib/hermesBrainPipeline.ts. The repaired Workroom now routes through the canonical engine and normalizes serializable responses before persistence and render.
legacy_pipeline_status: Hermes CEO Advisor Workroom is now a thin adapter to src/lib/hermes/hermesConversationEngine.ts; src/lib/hermesBrainPipeline.ts remains compatibility-only for legacy surfaces.
